current_task: Create a Word file with one sentence
knowledge_need: The agent needs compact knowledge about docx creation boundaries, validation, and return-to-task without retaining raw source answers.
already_checked: active memory has no executable docx creation reflex; source retention policy requires compact digest and raw deletion by default
candidate_knowledge: For task X, the missing knowledge is that a .docx file is not plain text renamed with a Word extension; it must be a valid DOCX/OOXML package created by a DOCX-capable application, library, or existing approved helper. The agent should learn only the minimum boundary: how to produce one document containing exactly one intended sentence, where the output path should be, what metadata or default content may appear, and how to validate the file before returning to the parent task while retaining only a compact digest and deleting raw source material by default.
missing_concepts: DOCX is a structured Office Open XML package, not raw text
approved creation mechanism must be identified before execution
target sentence and output filename/path must be explicit
validation must check both file format and visible document text
raw learning material should be compacted into a digest and not retained by default
suggested_decomposition: define output file location and name
create the smallest valid Word document
return compact result to task X
safe_learning_steps: read only the local policy or tool notes that define allowed document creation methods
check whether an existing approved helper or application boundary is already available
learn the minimum DOCX validation expectations without copying raw examples into memory
record only a compact digest of the usable creation and validation boundary
validation_needed: confirm the output file exists at the intended path
confirm the file opens or parses as a valid DOCX document
confirm the visible document body contains exactly the requested sentence
confirm no unintended extra body text was added
return_to_task_hint: After learning and validation planning, discard raw source notes, retain only the compact DOCX boundary digest, then return to task X to create and validate the one-sentence Word file using the approved method.
limits: NOT_PROVEN_UNTIL_VALIDATED: this draft does not prove any local tool, library, application, or repo helper exists; it does not create the document; it must not be treated as evidence that the final DOCX is valid or complete.

promotion_decision.owner_decision_required: only if promotion beyond case pattern is requested
promotion_decision.reason: One source answer is material only; default is compact reusable case pattern plus validation/return hint.

boundary: CODEX_DRAFT only; agent must validate before acting; compact digest required; raw source not retained by default.
